message:
fix(connector): numeric safety, resource bounding, and off-by-one fixes across subsystems

Floating-point safety:
- reputation.rs: guard pub_record.score with is_finite(), fallback to
  0.0 to prevent NaN/Inf poisoning reputation calculations
- operator_intelligence.rs: reject NaN/Inf risk_budget during config
  validation; guard expected_loss and cumulative totals with is_finite()

Integer overflow/underflow:
- claim_compiler.rs: use saturating_add for entries.len() + claims.len()
  capacity check; also extend scoreboard digest to hash submitter_id,
  claim_summary, evidence_count, evidence_uris with length prefixes
- repair_controller.rs: use saturating_sub for max_units - total_used
  to prevent underflow panic
- region_ownership.rs: replace bare fetch_add(1, Relaxed) with
  atomic_next() using compare_exchange_weak + saturating_add to prevent
  wrap-around on REGION_SEQ and CX_SEQ counters

Off-by-one fix:
- admission_budget.rs: change failed_auth_count <= max_failed_auth to
  < so reaching exactly max is treated as exceeding budget

Resource bounding:
- conformance_profile.rs: cap per_cap vector at MAX_CAPABILITY_RESULTS
  (4096) via push_bounded() to prevent unbounded growth
- rollout_state.rs: clean up temp file if atomic rename fails in
  persist() to prevent orphaned .tmp.* files on disk

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
